name: IC Triage
description: Triages IT incidents by assessing severity, checking service health, and creating or escalating incident records.

conversation_starters.title: What incidents are active right now?
Check service health
conversation_starters.text: What is the current health status of all services?

conversation_starters.title: Report a new incident
conversation_starters.text: The payment service is down affecting all customers, create a P1 incident

conversation_starters.title: Escalate an incident
conversation_starters.text: Escalate INC-2026-041 to P1 — customer impact is broader than initially assessed
